zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，谨慎观望]
zh.content:
当前，雪崩币(AVAX)在9.6053美元附近震荡整理，24小时变化为0.57%。该币种在日内交易中呈现出高点9.6257美元和低点9.5436美元的区间，显示出市场情绪相对平稳。尽管价格波动不大，但投资者仍需关注即将到来的趋势变化。

从技术指标来看，当前的MACD显示出微弱的看涨信号，但RSI数据缺失使得短期超买或超卖的判断变得困难。SMA(20)为9.39739美元，当前价格高于该均线，表明短期内可能存在支撑位。若价格回调至该均线附近，可能成为买入机会。

就支撑和阻力位而言，9.5436美元可视为强支撑位，而9.6257美元则是短期阻力位。若价格突破9.6257美元，可能引发进一步上涨；反之，若跌破9.5436美元，将增加下行风险。因此，投资者应密切关注这两个关键价位的突破情况。

综合来看，建议投资者在当前市场环境中保持谨慎观望的态度，关注价格的波动和技术指标的变化。若出现明确的突破信号，再考虑相应的进场或离场策略，以降低风险并把握可能的盈利机会。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche (AVAX) is currently trading at 9.6053, exhibiting a modest 24-hour change of 0.57%. The price has shown some resilience, bouncing off a low of 9.5436 and approaching the recent high of 9.6257. This behavior suggests a potential bullish momentum as the price hovers above the 20-day simple moving average (SMA) of 9.39739. If the upward trend continues, a break above the recent high could confirm further bullish sentiment, possibly targeting the next psychological level around 10.00.

In terms of technical indicators, the absence of the Relative Strength Index (RSI) limits the analysis of momentum, but the MACD reading at 0.061259833 suggests that there is still positive momentum. A bullish crossover on the MACD would reinforce the current upward trend, while a decline below this level could indicate a potential reversal. Traders should monitor these indicators closely, as they can provide signals for entry or exit points in the market.

Support levels are established around 9.54, which coincides with the recent low, while resistance is seen at 9.63, the recent high. A sustained move above this resistance could open the way for higher targets, but a failure to hold above 9.54 could lead to a retest of lower support levels. Investors should consider placing stop-loss orders slightly below key support to mitigate potential risks.

For traders looking to enter the market, a buy position may be considered if AVAX breaks above 9.63 with strong volume, indicating bullish continuation. Conversely, if the price retraces towards the support of 9.54 and holds, it may present a buying opportunity for those looking to capitalize on a rebound. Overall, maintaining a cautious yet optimistic outlook will be crucial in navigating the current market dynamics.
